themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 7 verses. Commentary leans on "Speak unto Rehoboam the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and to all Israel in Judah and Benjami...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "And he ordained him priests for the high places, and for the devils, and for the calves which...". Word-study detail reinforces "רְחַבְעָ֥ם: and made Rehoboam - rechabam, an israelite king".

themes.label: Love
themes.summary: This chapter foregrounds love, affection, covenant loyalty, or sacrificial care. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse.
